{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Sea Drake
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sea Drake]] is a sacred beast.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
